prompt: Photorealistic vertical 9:16 beauty portrait. a 23-year-old Bangladeshi woman, warm light-brown natural skin, long wavy dark hair worn down, bright friendly smile, simple pastel casual top, holding the skincare product 'cosrx-advanced-snail-mucin-96-power-essence-100ml' beside her cheek with the product front facing the camera. The model/background may be generated, but the visible product must come from the supplied real product reference. Do not invent replacement packaging, label text, logo, claims, offer text, price, COD badge, watermark, poster border, or callouts. Natural hand anatomy, product not distorted, product clear enough for owner identity review.
instructions: Use a generated/model background if needed, but keep the final product layer grounded in product_image_reference. No price/COD/brand overlay text inside the raw model shot. Owner review is required before campaign use.
